d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Tilaya loses [[70%]] HP and gains Vine Ward, a shield that blocks up to [[120%]]<HP> damage. Vine Ward automatically recovers [[10%]]<HP> shield value every second and makes Tilaya [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while active. When Vine Ward breaks, it enters a [[3]]-second cooldown, after which its shield value is restored to [[45%]]<HP>.
Active. Tilaya swings her greatsword [[8]] times, hitting enemies within a 2-tile arc in front. Each swing deals [[60%]]<ATK> damage twice. While casting this skill, Tilaya reduces her damage taken by [[70%]]; every time she takes [[4]] hits, she performs an additional swing, up to [[12]] swings total. If no enemies are within range, Tilaya charges toward the nearest enemy and continues casting this skill. Tilaya's Haste stat does not affect this skill when used actively.
Increases each swing hit's damage to [[65%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases each swing hit's damage to [[70%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases each swing hit's damage to [[75%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases each swing hit's damage to [[80%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Tilaya charges briefly and launches a powerful strike on her target, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> damage. If Vine Ward is active, she restores its shield value by [[160%]] of the damage dealt.
Increases the damage dealt to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[250%]]<ATK>.

Tilaya's greatsword resonates with nearby plants, causing her attacks to deal extra damage equal to [[6%]] of her current shield value for [[10]]s. This extra damage cannot exceed [[200%]]<ATK>.
When Tilaya casts this skill, the duration of the resonance is extended by [[3.5]]s for each ally within [[2]] tiles.
Increases the extra damage to [[7%]] of Tilaya's current shield value.
Increases the extra damage to [[8%]] of Tilaya's current shield value.
Increases the extra damage to [[9%]] of Tilaya's current shield value.
Increases Vitality by [[11]] during battle.
Increases Vitality by [[15]] during battle.
Increases Vitality by [[19]] during battle.

The first time Vine Ward breaks, it instantly recovers [[120%]]<HP> shield value without triggering its cooldown. For subsequent Vine Ward breaks, the shield value recovered after cooldown is increased to [[60%]]<HP>.
Increases the shield value recovered after Vine Ward's cooldown to [[70%]]<HP>.

After Vine Ward remains active for [[15]]s, its bond with nature deepens. While active, it increases the max HP by [[40%]] and Phys & Magic DEF by [[60%]] for all allies within 2 tiles. The max HP gained from this effect cannot exceed [[80%]] of Tilaya's initial max HP.
Increases the shield value recovered after Vine Ward's cooldown to [[80%]]<HP>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 Crit Resist, 15 Ranged DEF.

d: Increases Vine Ward's shield value recovery to [[15%]]<HP> per second while Tilaya casts her Ultimate.
